channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd June
item.description:
Graffiti on boundary fence of Red Hill Primary School - what3words location ///gown.aims.sound

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road starting to sink into the ground, 2nd June
item.description:
The road has been patched but continues to sink into the ground. Fear that a sinkhole may open up if not dealt with properly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Surrey Water Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned caravan on public road, 2nd June
item.description:
Abandoned caravan on public road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abingdon Road, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd June
item.description:
Graffiti on electricity sub-station on Community Path (running from High Street to Empress Drive)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The trees on Highwood and adjacent Limes Avenues need to be cut as a matter of urgency. Pedestrians cannot even walk between a tree and wall of a house. It is dangerous as you have to keep going onto the road and there is no visibility with the overgrown trees. as, 2nd June
item.description:
See above - this is getting increasingly dangerous for pedestrians. Please arrange to cut back the trees as a matter of urgency.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Highwood Avenue, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing drain, 2nd June
item.description:
Resident called report rain water is not following away o/s 15 Inglewood road .Please can we inspect before the road floods.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Inglewood Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd June
item.description:
On refuse bin on Community Path (running from High Street to Empress Drive)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 17 Plympton Road, 2nd June
item.description:
Pavement has been pushed up because of the tree roots. It is a hazard, I have tripped on it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Torbay Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd June
item.description:
Graffiti on post at western end of Community Path (running from High Street to Empress Drive)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empress Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches on public foothpath, 2nd June
item.description:
The shrub on the edge of the steps between Camden Park Road and Yester road is causing an obstruction due to low hanging branches. It is opposite 35/ 37 Yester road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yester Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Graffiti on 12 Grove Close communal wall overlooking the open space in the middle of the estate SE23
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalmain Road, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Broken Glass, 2nd June
item.description:
Broken glass along Park side of Crystal Palace Parade by bus station and near to Subway. Please can this cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Parade, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Burnt Out Motorbike, 2nd June
item.description:
Burnt out motorbike needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Barnfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I have hopefully reported the issue of the tree outside our property in my response earlier in this report.To confirm the tree is located between 150 and 152 Woodside Avenue BR7 6BS, 2nd June
item.description:
As explained previously the tree is leaning towards the two properties and this has become more severe in the last weeks. The tree is also causing damage to the pavement providing a significant trip hazard, as well sinking the water meter enclosures in the pavement and cracking to our dwarf boundary wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodside Avenue, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling through out road, 2nd June
item.description:
Dog fouling whole length of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pinnacle Hill North, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10+ Horses Loose in the Park, 2nd June
item.description:
10+ Horses Loose in the Park - Looks like they have escaped from somewhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Barnfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gaps between pavement slabs need filling, 2nd June
item.description:
Gaps between pavement slabs need filling
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Exchange Avenue, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road defect, 2nd June
item.description:
Road defect on White Horse Hill (between junction with Beanshaw and bus stop E) NB Although water is pooling at this location (even when there has been no rain for several days), Thames Water have indicated that it is not their responsibility

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, White Horse Hill, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
